page.content: In FY2023, Vale SA reported an Ore Grade of 64.5% for Iron Ore with a Recovery Rate of 85.0% and a production cost of €1,200 per tonne, resulting in a total production of 2,000,000 tonnes, while Copper Ore had an average grade of 1.5% and a recovery rate of 92.0% with a production cost of €5.0 per tonne, yielding a total production of 500,000 tonnes. The overall average ore grade was 66.0% with an average recovery of 86.0% and a production cost target of €55.00 per tonne, achieving an actual total production of 2,500,000 tonnes.

page.content: Profitability indices revealed an operating margin of 4.0%, a net profit margin of 3.2%, a debt to equity ratio of 15.0, and a return on equity of 10.0%. Earnings before tax stood at €8,000,000 with free cash flow of €10.0. Financial ratios included a P/E Ratio of 1.5, current ratio of 1.2, quick ratio of 25.0%, debt/equity of 6.0%, interest coverage of 15.0, gross margin of 20.0%, net margin of 6.0%, return on assets of 12.0%, return on equity of 6.5%, revenue growth of 30BEUR, and an EV/EBITDA of 5.5, while the overall operating margin was 10.0%.
